content.full_text:
April 16, 2004

Bonnie M. Dumanis, District Attorney
County of San Diego
330 W. Broadway, Suite 1300
San Diego, CA 92101

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-068

Dear Ms. Dumanis:

I write to follow up on yesterday’s telephone conversation, in which we concluded that it would be most appropriate to withdraw your request for formal written advice. As I explained, we are unable to offer you the assistance you requested.

Please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660 should you have any additional questions or comments.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Lawrence T. Woodlock
Senior Counsel, Legal Division

LTW:jg
